context: Tests whether the agent recognizes a multi-intent question and asks the user which intent to address first, rather than guessing a single handoff or chaining multiple handoffs.

checklist.name: Acknowledges multiple intents
checklist.description: Output explicitly identifies that the user has described more than one distinct intent (e.g., 'three things', 'multiple goals', 'these are separate concerns')

checklist.name: Lists at least two intents distinctly
checklist.description: Output enumerates at least two distinct intents from the user's question (e.g., environment setup, order tracking, presence/offline detection)

checklist.name: Asks which to address first
checklist.description: Output includes a clarifying question asking the user which intent to address first

checklist.name: No single handoff produced
checklist.description: Output does NOT contain a completed Intent/Skill/MCP tool/Docs source/Next step handoff block as if the multi-intent question were a single-intent question

checklist.name: No chained handoffs
checklist.description: Output does NOT contain three sequential handoff blocks one after another to cover all three intents

checklist.name: No implementation code
checklist.description: Output contains no code blocks implementing any of the three concerns

checklist.name: Concise
checklist.description: The clarifying response is concise (not a long lecture) — it identifies the multi-intent issue, lists the intents briefly, and asks the question

checklist.name: Does not paraphrase specialist content
checklist.description: Output does not reproduce instructions from pubnub-keyset-management, pubnub-order-delivery-driver, or pubnub-presence in detail
